description: The star at the center that everything orbits.
name: Aurinko

description: A visitor with a tail that falls toward the star and races away.
name: Komeetta

description: The moon that raises the tides of the earth.
name: Kuu

description: The blue world with a companion, belonging to the worlds.
name: Maa

description: The catalogue of worlds around the star.
name: Planeetat

description: The tidal pull of the moon on the sea.
name: Vuorovesi
